basic_details.short_information: Intelligent Communication Systems India Ltd. (ICSIL) has released the official MTS Notification 2026 at the official website. A total of 5 vacancies have been announced under the ICSIL MTS Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates with a qualification of Matriculation and above can attend the walk-in interview on 11 May 2026. The official notification PDF and walk-in details are available below.

important_dates.last_date: Please refer to the official notification for last date details.

age_limit.age_limit: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.
age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

salary_details.details: MTS: Rs. 20371/- per month (As per minimum wages for Semi-skilled)

selection_process: Scrutiny of documents Interaction/Interview Document Verification

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for ICSIL MTS posts?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the MTS posts is scheduled for 11 May 2026. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum qualification required for the MTS post?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification required for the MTS post is Matriculation and above, which essentially means a 10th-pass certificate.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the MTS post?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the MTS post will receive a salary of Rs. 20371/- per month, as per the minimum wages for semi-skilled workers.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the MTS post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 5 vacancies available for the Multi-Tasking Staff (MTS) position in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for ICSIL MTS recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee for all categories is Rs. 590/- (non-refundable) for the One Time Registration (OTR) on the ICSIL website.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the MTS recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves scrutiny of documents, followed by an interaction/interview, and finally, document verification.

faq.question: Q7. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: You should carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies, including ID proof, educational certificates, and category certificates if applicable.

faq.question: Q8. Is the job on a permanent or contractual basis?
faq.answer: The job is on a contractual outsourced basis for Delhi State Civil Supplies Corporation Limited (DSCSC), Delhi.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the walk-in interview venue?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at the ICSIL office in New Delhi, Delhi, with pincode 110020.

faq.question: Q10. Can I apply online for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, this recruitment is being done through a walk-in interview. You need to attend the interview in person with the required documents and proof of payment.
